svg.title: Pump Cartridge Assembly — Engineering Drawing
svg.text: 5 Parts: Tray + Lid + Lever + Release Plate + Front Bezel — Third-Angle Orthographic Projection
Material: PETG | All dimensions in mm | Scale noted per view
DETAIL A — Cam/Lever Mechanism (section at X = 7)
Scale: 6 px/mm | Cross-section through left cam lobe
DETAIL B — JG Fitting Bore (section at F1)
Scale: 8 px/mm | Half-section through fitting centerline
DETAIL C — Rail Rib and Snap-Fit Clip
Scale: 6 px/mm | Cross-section through left tray wall
3. Lever — 130 mm span, 120 x 40 mm paddle
OTS: 4x JG PP0408W, 8x M3 SHCS, 8x M3 inserts
OTS: 4x Cu pads, 2x push rods, silicone tubing
Lever pivot: Y=9, Z=58 in tray frame
Rail rib: 2 mm protrusion, 20 mm tall
Release plate: 3 mm thick, 3 mm travel
Guide post: 4 mm dia, 22 mm long, 2 places
Guide post clearance: 0.3 mm (4.3 mm slot)
